characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, dark hair pulled back. She is seen from the side/back.
characters.wardrobe: Black long-sleeved top and dark pants.
characters.demeanor: Relaxed and comfortable, leaning against her partner.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, average build, short light brown hair. He is seen from the side.
characters.wardrobe: Grey t-shirt, dark pants, and patterned socks.
characters.demeanor: Relaxed, sitting with his arm around his partner.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes a relatable, relaxed slice-of-life moment to hook the viewer.
- Uses text overlays to tell a compelling, emotional success story about a partner learning English.
- Builds social proof and emotional payoff (family pride) before delivering a clear, practical CTA.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Mummy papa shocked reh gaye jab mere husband ne confidently English mein baat ki [Mom and dad were left shocked when my husband confidently spoke in English]
Unhone turant sabko call karke bataya [She immediately called everyone to tell them]
He'd been practicing on Supernova for 3 months
Roz sirf 15 minutes [Just 15 minutes daily]
Aaj hi apna level check karein aur start karein [Check your level today and start]
